title: vochysia rufa subsp. eurufa
intro: Vochysia rufa subsp. eurufa, also known as the tocapurú tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This tree has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Vochysia rufa subsp. eurufa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote healing, as well as its potential to protect against infections and diseases. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
